title: hieracium angustatum subsp. naevosum
intro: Hieracium angustatum subsp. naevosum, a subspecies of the Hieracium plant, is a type of flowering plant commonly known as Hawkweed, characterized by its yellow or white flowers and narrow leaves. The medicinal properties of Hieracium angustatum subsp. naevosum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. This plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and providing antioxidant protection. Hieracium angustatum subsp. naevosum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
